name: The Brenham National Bank
description_short: Brenham National Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and debit card services with locations in Brenham and College Station, Texas.
description_long:
Brenham National Bank (BNB) is a traditional community bank headquartered in Brenham, Texas, with physical branch locations in both Brenham and College Station. The bank operates as an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard retail banking services to personal and business customers in central Texas.

The bank's service offerings include multiple personal checking account plans, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal and business debit cards, mortgage lending for home purchases with fixed rates, and merchant card processing services. They feature online banking with advanced security features and offer instant debit card issuance at their physical locations. The bank advertises a 7-month Jumbo CD at 3.50% APY for deposits of $250,000 or more.

Brenham National Bank distinguishes itself through convenience features including 5 ATMs located in Brenham and College Station, instant debit card issuance in-lobby with personalized images, and ATM fee reimbursement up to $25 monthly for Signature Interest account holders. They've partnered with Texas Small Business Services for merchant processing needs and emphasize personalized service through personal bankers available at both locations.

As a community bank, BNB serves a geographically limited market in south-central Texas and is best suited for customers in the Brenham and College Station areas seeking traditional banking relationships. The bank's product lineup is standard and competitive but does not include specialized consumer finance products like personal loans, credit cards with rewards programs, or alternative financial services that larger institutions typically offer. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with multiple plan options
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) including 7-month Jumbo CD at 3.50% APY
Personal Discover debit cards with instant issuance
Fixed-rate mortgage lending for home purchases
Merchant card processing services via partnership with Texas Small Business Services
ATM access at 5 locations in Brenham and College Station
ATM network access with fee reimbursement for qualifying accounts
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Instant debit card issuance in-lobby with personalized card images and self-selected PIN
ATM fee reimbursement up to $25/month for Signature Interest account holders
5 conveniently located ATMs in Brenham and College Station service areas
Fixed-rate mortgage lending available for home purchases
Online banking with advanced security features
Personal banker assistance available at physical locations
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Brenham and College Station, Texas only
No specialized consumer loan products (personal loans, credit cards, emergency cash) visible on website
High minimum deposit requirement ($250,000) for featured Jumbo CD rate
ATM fee reimbursement limited to $25/month and requires specific Signature Interest account
No 24/7 customer service phone number listed for non-emergency inquiries during business hours
best_for: Residents of Brenham and College Station, Texas seeking basic banking services
Homebuyers in central Texas looking for fixed-rate mortgage financing
Small business owners needing merchant card processing and business banking services
High-net-worth customers with $250,000+ available for CD investments
diagnosis: Brenham National Bank is best for consumers and small businesses in the Brenham and College Station, Texas area who want traditional FDIC-insured banking with personal service and fixed-rate mortgages. The primary caveat is severely limited geographic availability—this bank is only practical for customers with local presence in central Texas, making it unsuitable for those outside this region or seeking specialized financial products beyond basic banking.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, and mortgages in Brenham and College Station, Texas.
